author: Stephane Ribes and Alwaysdialingin
name: Decent Profile Generator
description: Generates optimized espresso profiles based on bean and grind characteristics. Configure settings to match your current beans, then connect to the profileGenerated WebSocket event to receive the computed profile. The UI can also upload the generated profile to your library and load it onto the connected machine. http://localhost:8080/api/v1/plugins/decent-profile.reaplugin/ui

roastDegree.description: Roast degree. Options: Light Roast, Medium-Light Roast, Medium Roast, Medium-Dark Roast, Dark Roast

roastQuality.description: Roast quality. Options: Underdevelopped, Smoky or overroasted, Outstanding, I have no idea

origin.description: Bean origin. Options: Kenya, Ethiopia, Other Africa, Colombia, Other America, Other

highlight.description: What to highlight. Options: Body / Mouthfeel, Sweetness and acidity, Floral and fruity flavors, Chocolate and nuts flavors, I'm not sure

avoid.description: What to avoid. Options: Sourness or high acidity, Bitterness or astringency, Nothing in particular

strength.description: Desired strength. Options: Allongé (4.5 - 5.5% TDS), Low intensity (7.0 - 7.5% TDS), 7.5 - 8.0% TDS, 8.0 - 8.5% TDS, 8.5 - 9.0% TDS, Average intensity (9.0 - 9.5% TDS), 9.5 - 10% TDS, 10.5 - 11.5% TDS, High intensity (11.5 - 12.5% TDS)

basket.description: Basket type. Options: High precision double (Decent, VST), Single (Decent 7g, LM Strada 7g), High precision + paper filter below the puck, Reneka Micro-Sieve or IMS Super Fine

puckPrep.description: Puck prep quality. Options: Can be improved, OK, I am not sure

profileTitle.description: Profile title used in the output file (default: "Your Next Decent Profile")

profileFormat.description: Output format: legacy-tcl or json-v2 (default: legacy-tcl)

layout.description: UI layout. Options: baseline (two-column workspace, Inter font, orange accent) or decent (single-column stacked, green accent). Default: decent

profile.description: Full generated profile text ready to load on the machine
